POKEMONANCIENT-PSYCHIC_TERRAIN_POWER.des: Attacks that target ALL enemies deal 50% additional damage.
POKEMONANCIENT-PSYCHIC_TERRAIN_POWER.sma: Attacks that target ALL enemies deal [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] additional damage.
POKEMONANCIENT-SPEED_POWER.title: SpeedPower
POKEMONANCIENT-SPEED_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card for every [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Speed[/gold].
POKEMONANCIENT-SPEED_POWER.smartDescript: {Amount:cond:<0?Decreases|Increases} cards drawn at the start of your turn by [blue]{Amount:abs()}[/blue].
